subject: SURGERY / F.Y.I.
body:
Hey J.  - in a nut shell.  Surgery date in St Louis ,  Missouri on  Thursday, 
April 24th.   NINE days !  Somethng  on my cardiac clearance  questionable to 
Dr BRIDWELL  so i have to see  him again and their cardiologist  & 
anesthesiologist  prior  on MONDAY  April 21 st  .( Think it's normal to think  about  
changing my mind even if know iITS right but for the distance ?? )  Need  to 
leave out of Miami, not Ft Laud. ,  on  Saturday Apr  19th   and have set return 
so far on May 4 th - of course  return a maybe depending on recoup process, & 
 Dr . and airplane availability then - - - -Now , so many surprise  {"ifs"} - 
-  I didn't think far ahead and   thought  We'd  be  home for 1s t nighht of 
Passover but a  NO.   
I  feel   really bad we can't have SEDER (  even "pseudo" )  with  all the  
kids with Brucie  Saturday -  
 Impt being they are Christian children  , really ,  to let  grandkids know 
we are Jewish   (I could write a book  too...)  .  I'll come up with something 
for them .  For us  ,  I'll bring Matzoh  (to really stuff up ) -then  fight. 
For you ??   How are you anyway ???  Me ? Losing my mind, 
 
 Sounding like my Mother which is scarily  scarey,     ( or is someone 
"channeling "  your     MOTHER ?!)
 
MARCIA

Finance.      (http://money.aol.com/tax?NCID=aolcmp00300000002850)
body_html:
Hey J.  - in a nut shell.  Surgery date in St Louis , Missouri on  Thursday, April 24th.   NINE days !  Somethng on my cardiac clearance  questionable to Dr BRIDWELL  so i have to see him again and their cardiologist  & anesthesiologist  prior on MONDAY  April 21 st  .( Think it's normal to think  about changing my mind even if know iITS right but for the distance ?? )  Need to leave out of Miami, not Ft Laud. ,  on  Saturday Apr 19th   and have set return so far on May 4 th - of course return a maybe depending on recoup process, & Dr . and airplane availability then - - - -Now , so many surprise {"ifs"} - -  I didn't think far ahead and  thought  We'd  be  home for 1s t nighht of Passover but a NO.  
I  feel   really bad we can't have SEDER ( even "pseudo" )  with  all the  kids with Brucie  Saturday -  
 Impt being they are Christian children  , really ,  to let grandkids know we are Jewish   (I could write a book too...)  .  I'll come up with something for them .  For us ,  I'll bring Matzoh  (to really stuff up ) -then fight. 
For you ??   How are you anyway ???  Me ? Losing my mind,
 
 Sounding like my Mother which is scarily scarey,     ( or is someone "channeling " your     MOTHER ?!)
 
MARCIA
